title: cleome brachiata
intro: Cleome brachiata, also known as the Stick Seedeater or Spider Flower, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Cleomaceae family. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cleome brachiata include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, or ointments, which are often used in Ayurvedic and traditional medicine practices.
